response: <<vegetable>> <<actor>> <<bottom>> <<pack>> <<sick>> <<f(x) = 2x³ - 3x² + ax + b>> <<when x = 2>> <<the polynomial evaluates to zero>> <<which creates a gap in the encryption pattern>> <<you want to fill>> <<use this information to find a relationship between a and b>> <<the polynomial has a repeated root>> <<given that one of the roots is x = 2>> <<find the value of a and b>> <<such that the polynomial has x = 2 as a double root>> <<the polynomial is f(x) = 2x³ - 3x² + ax + b>> <<the root x = 2 is a double root>> <<so the polynomial can be written as f(x) = 2(x - 2)²(x - c)>> <<expand this expression>> <<2(x² - 4x + 4)(x - c) = 2(x³ - cx² - 4x² + 4c x + 4x - 4c)>> <<simplify the expression>> <<2(x³ - (c + 4)x² + (4c + 4)x - 4c)>> <<which gives f(x) = 2x³ - 2(c + 4)x² + 2(4c + 4)x - 8c>> <<compare coefficients with the original polynomial>> <<original: 2x³ - 3x² + ax + b>> <<so: -2(c + 4) = -3 >> <<solve for c>> <<-2c - 8 = -3 >> <<-2c = 5 >> <<c = -5/2>> <<and 2(4c + 4) = a >> <<4c + 4 = 4(-5/2) + 4 = -10 + 4 = -6 >> <<a = 2(-6) = -12>> <<and -8c = -8(-5/2) = 20 >> <<b = 20>> <<so the values are a = -12 and b = 20>> <<the polynomial is f(x) = 2x³ - 3x² - 12x + 20>> <<the final answer is>> <<"<<vegetable>> <<actor>> <<bottom>> <<pack>>
